task_completion.description: Navigate to or open the configuration file for the target web root.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a terminal or text editor open in '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public/', editing a file such as '.htaccess' or the Apache virtual host configuration file.

task_completion.description: Configure Apache to cache images (PNG, JPEG, GIF) for 1 month.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing Apache directives (like 'ExpiresByType', 'Header set Cache-Control', or 'FilesMatch') targeting image extensions (png, jpeg, jpg, gif) with an expiration of 1 month, 30 days, or 2592000 seconds.

task_completion.description: Configure Apache to cache stylesheets (CSS) and JavaScript (JS) for 1 week.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing Apache directives targeting '.css' and '.js' files with an expiration of 1 week, 7 days, or 604800 seconds.

task_completion.description: Ensure dynamic PHP files are not aggressively cached.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The caching configuration explicitly targets only static asset extensions (e.g., using FilesMatch "\.(css|js|png|jpg|jpeg|gif)$") OR explicitly excludes '.php' files, ensuring the global cache does not apply to dynamic scripts.

task_completion.description: Save the configuration and apply changes to the Apache server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the file being saved (e.g., exiting nano/vim) and, if a main Apache config was edited, a command like 'systemctl restart apache2', 'service apache2 reload', or 'apachectl restart' being executed.

integrity.description: The agent modifies the actual configuration file in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path in the text editor or terminal commands must clearly show '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public/.htaccess' or the legitimate Apache sites-available configuration, not a dummy or temporary file.

integrity.description: The agent does not use a script to fake HTTP responses or manually write HTTP headers into a text file to trick a curl test.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made using standard Apache configuration directives (mod_expires or mod_headers), not by creating a mock server or overriding curl.

integrity.description: The agent uses real system commands to restart Apache if required.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows standard Linux service management commands (systemctl, service) rather than just echoing success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory is definitively /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public. The caching requirement for images (PNG, JPEG, GIF) is exactly 1 month (2592000 seconds). The caching requirement for CSS and JS is exactly 1 week (604800 seconds). Look for these exact values or equivalent Apache directives (e.g., 'ExpiresByType image/png "access plus 1 month"' or 'max-age=2592000').
